title: Optimizing Claude tool usage for Postliterate Book
first_prompt: Analyze my usage of Claude Cowork and Chat and Code on the Postliterate Book project and suggest how I should optimize my usage, where I’m being inefficient, and what I should change in order to maxim
summary: Irwin was primarily trying to optimize his workflow and usage of Claude's various tools—including Cowork, Chat, and Code—for the ongoing Postliterate Book project. The conversation covered practical mechanics, such as how to update a session tracker and whether to use Claude Code or Cowork for vault work. They then focused on curating the project's knowledge base, leading to the review and eventual deletion of the `PostLiterate-Librarian-Design-Doc-v0_2.md` file, while also debating which files, such as `my-rules.md` and `Thesis-Statements.md`,
